import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';
import * as bcrypt from 'bcryptjs';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

const SALT_ROUNDS = 10;

export class AuthService {
  /**
   * Register a new user
   */
  async register(data: { username: string; email: string; password: string }) {
    // Check if email already exists
    const existingEmail = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email: data.email } });
    if (existingEmail) {
      throw { statusCode: 409, message: 'Email sudah terdaftar' };
    }

    // Check if username already exists
    const existingUsername = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { username: data.username } });
    if (existingUsername) {
      throw { statusCode: 409, message: 'Username sudah digunakan' };
    }

    // Hash password
    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(data.password, SALT_ROUNDS);

    // Create user
    const user = await prisma.user.create({
      data: {
        username: data.username,
        email: data.email,
        password: hashedPassword,
        role: 'USER',
        status: 'AKTIF',
      },
      select: {
        id: true,
        username: true,
        email: true,
        name: true,
        avatar: true,
        role: true,
        status: true,
        createdAt: true,
      }
    });

    return user;
  }

  /**
   * Login with email + password, returns user data (token generated in route)
   */
  async login(email: string, password: string) {
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });

    if (!user) {
      throw { statusCode: 401, message: 'Email atau password salah' };
    }

    if (user.status === 'DIBLOKIR') {
      throw { statusCode: 403, message: 'Akun Anda telah diblokir' };
    }

    const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password);
    if (!isValid) {
      throw { statusCode: 401, message: 'Email atau password salah' };
    }

    // Update last login
    await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id: user.id },
      data: { lastLogin: new Date() }
    });

    return {
      id: user.id,
      username: user.username,
      email: user.email,
      name: user.name,
      avatar: user.avatar,
      role: user.role,
      status: user.status,
    };
  }

  /**
   * Get user profile by ID
   */
  async getProfile(userId: string) {
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: userId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        username: true,
        email: true,
        name: true,
        avatar: true,
        role: true,
        status: true,
        lastLogin: true,
        createdAt: true,
      }
    });

    if (!user) {
      throw { statusCode: 404, message: 'User tidak ditemukan' };
    }

    return user;
  }

  /**
   * Hash a plain password (utility for seeding)
   */
  async hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {
    return bcrypt.hash(password, SALT_ROUNDS);
  }
}

export const authService = new AuthService();

import axios from 'axios';
import * as cheerio from 'cheerio';
import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';

const prisma = new PrismaClient();

export class ScraperService {
  /**
   * THE REAL ENGINE: Runs a specific scraper source
   */
  async runScraper(sourceId: string): Promise<any> {
    const source = await prisma.scraperSource.findUnique({
      where: { id: sourceId }
    });

    if (!source) throw new Error('Source not found');

    const startTime = Date.now();
    console.log(`[SCRAPER] Starting engine for: ${source.name} (${source.baseUrl})`);

    try {
      // Use cookies from environment or source config
      const scraperCookies = process.env.SCRAPER_COOKIES || '';
      const scraperUA = process.env.SCRAPER_USER_AGENT || 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36';

      const response = await axios.get(source.baseUrl, {
        headers: {
          'User-Agent': scraperUA,
          'Cookie': scraperCookies,
          'Accept': 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7',
          'Accept-Language': 'id-ID,id;q=0.9,en-US;q=0.8,en;q=0.7',
          'Referer': 'https://anichin.watch/',
          'Upgrade-Insecure-Requests': '1',
          'Sec-Ch-Ua': '"Not/A)Brand";v="8", "Chromium";v="147", "Google Chrome";v="147"',
          'Sec-Ch-Ua-Mobile': '?0',
          'Sec-Ch-Ua-Platform': '"Windows"',
        },
        timeout: 20000
      });

      const $ = cheerio.load(response.data);
      let createdCount = 0;
      let updatedCount = 0;

      // Anichin Selectors (.bsx for grid items)
      const items = $('.listupd .bsx');
      
      for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
        const el = items[i];
        const linkEl = $(el).find('a.tip');
        const title = linkEl.find('.tt').text().trim() || linkEl.attr('title');
        const link = linkEl.attr('href');
        const imgEl = $(el).find('.limit img');
        const imageUrl = imgEl.attr('data-src') || imgEl.attr('src');
        const episodeInfo = $(el).find('.epx').text().trim();

        if (title && link) {
          const slug = title.toLowerCase().replace(/ /g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]+/g, '');
          const existing = await prisma.content.findUnique({ where: { slug } });
          
          if (!existing) {
            await prisma.content.create({
              data: {
                title,
                slug,
                type: 'DONGHUA',
                status: 'ONGOING',
                imageUrl: imageUrl || '',
                description: `Terbaru: ${episodeInfo}. Auto-Synced from Anichin.`,
                rating: 8.8,
              }
            });
            createdCount++;
          } else {
            updatedCount++;
            await prisma.content.update({
              where: { id: existing.id },
              data: { description: `Update Terkini: ${episodeInfo}.` }
            });
          }
        }
      }

      const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);

      const log = await prisma.scraperLog.create({
        data: {
          sourceId: source.id,
          status: 'SELESAI',
          itemsFound: items.length,
          itemsAdded: createdCount,
          itemsFailed: 0,
          duration: `${duration}s`
        }
      });

      await prisma.scraperSource.update({
        where: { id: source.id },
        data: { lastScraped: new Date(), status: 'Aktif' }
      });

      return { success: true, log };

    } catch (error: any) {
      const errorMsg = error.response ? `HTTP ${error.response.status}: ${error.message}` : error.message;
      console.error(`[SCRAPER ERROR] ${errorMsg}`);
      
      await prisma.scraperLog.create({
        data: {
          sourceId: source.id,
          status: 'ERROR',
          error: errorMsg,
        }
      });

      await prisma.scraperSource.update({
        where: { id: source.id },
        data: { status: 'Error' }
      });

      throw new Error(errorMsg);
    }
  }

  async scrapeTrending() { return prisma.content.findMany({ take: 5, orderBy: { rating: 'desc' } }); }
  async getSources() { return prisma.scraperSource.findMany({ include: { _count: { select: { logs: true } } }, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' } }); }
  async createSource(data: any) { return prisma.scraperSource.create({ data }); }
}

export const scraperService = new ScraperService();

content.text:
# Analisis Aplikasi Audira Zenith - Fitur Incomplete & Skeleton

## RINGKASAN EKSEKUTIF
Aplikasi Audira Zenith memiliki **40+ admin pages** dengan UI yang sudah didesain, namun banyak yang masih skeleton (UI-only tanpa backend integration). Backend API sudah ~70% complete dengan beberapa gaps dalam error handling dan validation. Berikut prioritas fitur yang perlu diselesaikan.

---

## 1. ADMIN PAGES - SKELETON IMPLEMENTATIONS (UI ONLY)

### 🔴 CRITICAL - Perlu Backend Integration Urgent

**AdminBackup.tsx** - SKELETON
- ✅ UI: Lengkap dengan form backup/restore, storage visualization
- ❌ Backend: Tidak ada API untuk backup/restore functionality
- ❌ Missing: Database backup logic, file compression, restore mechanism
- 🎯 Impact: Data loss risk, no disaster recovery capability
- ⏱️ Effort: HIGH (perlu implement backup service, cron jobs)

**AdminAnalytics.tsx** - SKELETON  
- ✅ UI: 5 tabs (Overview, Konten, Pengguna, Traffic, Keuangan) dengan charts
- ❌ Backend: Hanya ada `/api/dashboard/stats` basic, tidak ada analytics detail
- ❌ Missing: Real-time visitor tracking, device analytics, traffic source breakdown, revenue tracking
- 🎯 Impact: Admin tidak bisa monitor performa aplikasi
- ⏱️ Effort: HIGH (perlu analytics service, event tracking)

**AdminPermissions.tsx** - SKELETON
- ✅ UI: Role matrix, permission table lengkap
- ❌ Backend: Tidak ada API untuk manage roles/permissions
- ❌ Missing: Dynamic role creation, permission assignment, role-based access control enforcement
- 🎯 Impact: RBAC tidak berfungsi, security risk
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM (perlu permission service, middleware update)

**AdminSettings.tsx** - PARTIAL
- ✅ UI: 11 tabs (Umum, Website, Tampilan, Konten, dll)
- ✅ Backend: `/api/settings` GET/PUT ada
- ❌ Missing: Maintenance mode toggle, cache management, logging configuration
- ❌ Missing: Logo/Favicon upload integration
- 🎯 Impact: Admin tidak bisa configure sistem
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

**AdminSEO.tsx** - PARTIAL
- ✅ UI: SEO settings, Open Graph, preview
- ✅ Backend: `/api/seo` GET/PUT ada
- ❌ Missing: Sitemap generation, robots.txt management, 404 page customization, redirect rules
- ❌ Missing: Tab functionality (Analitik, Sitemap, Robots.txt, 404 Page, Redirect)
- 🎯 Impact: SEO optimization incomplete
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

**AdminScrapedDashboard.tsx** - PARTIAL
- ✅ UI: Real-time scraper monitoring, charts, source table
- ✅ Backend: Socket.io integration untuk real-time updates
- ❌ Missing: `/api/scrapers/stats`, `/api/scrapers/logs`, `/api/scrapers` endpoints
- ❌ Missing: Scraper queue management, error recovery
- 🎯 Impact: Scraper automation tidak bisa dimonitor
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM-HIGH

**AdminScrapedConfig.tsx** - SKELETON
- ✅ UI: Configuration form untuk scraper sources
- ❌ Backend: Tidak ada API untuk manage scraper sources
- ❌ Missing: Source CRUD, schedule management
- 🎯 Impact: Scraper tidak bisa dikonfigurasi
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

**AdminScrapedHistory.tsx** - SKELETON
- ✅ UI: History table dengan filters
- ❌ Backend: Tidak ada `/api/scrapers/history` endpoint
- 🎯 Impact: Tidak bisa track scraper history
- ⏱️ Effort: LOW

### 🟡 HIGH - Perlu Completion

**AdminBatchUpload.tsx** - FUNCTIONAL
- ✅ UI & Backend: Batch upload episodes sudah working
- ❌ Missing: Validation untuk duplicate episodes, better error messages
- ⏱️ Effort: LOW

**AdminAds.tsx** - PARTIAL
- ✅ UI: Ads list, filter, pagination
- ✅ Backend: `/api/ads` CRUD ada
- ❌ Missing: Ad placement preview, performance metrics, click tracking
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

**AdminActivityLog.tsx** - PARTIAL
- ✅ Backend: `/api/activity-logs` ada
- ❌ Missing: Advanced filtering, export functionality, detailed log viewer
- ⏱️ Effort: LOW

---

## 2. API ROUTES - INCOMPLETE IMPLEMENTATIONS

### Backend Routes Status

| Route | Status | Missing |
|-------|--------|---------|
| `/api/admin/*` | 70% | Backup/Restore, Analytics detail, Permissions CRUD |
| `/api/content/*` | 85% | Content recommendation, trending calculation |
| `/api/episodes/*` | 90% | Episode streaming stats, quality variants |
| `/api/users/*` | 80% | User profile completion, preferences |
| `/api/comments/*` | 75% | Comment threading, spam detection |
| `/api/engagement/*` | 85% | Social sharing, recommendation engine |
| `/api/scrape/*` | 60% | Error recovery, rate limiting, source management |
| `/api/upload/*` | 70% | Image optimization, CDN integration, batch upload |
| `/api/settings/*` | 60% | Maintenance mode, cache control, logging |
| `/api/seo/*` | 50% | Sitemap, robots.txt, redirects |

---

## 3. SERVICES - INCOMPLETE IMPLEMENTATIONS

### notificationHandler.ts - PARTIAL
- ✅ Socket.io integration untuk notifications
- ❌ Missing: Email notifications, SMS alerts, notification preferences
- ❌ Missing: Notification history persistence
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

### auth.ts - FUNCTIONAL
- ✅ Register, login, profile, password hashing
- ❌ Missing: 2FA/MFA, OAuth integration, session management
- ❌ Missing: Password reset email integration
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

### scraperQueue.ts - PARTIAL
- ✅ Queue management dengan Bull/Redis
- ❌ Missing: Error recovery, retry logic, rate limiting
- ❌ Missing: Scraper source management
- ⏱️ Effort: MEDIUM

### Scraper Services (mangaDexScraper, consumetScraper, comickScraper) - PARTIAL
- ✅ Basic scraping logic ada
- ❌ Missing: Error handling, duplicate detection, data validation
- ❌ Missing: Proxy rotation, rate limiting
- ⏱️ Effort: HIGH

---

## 4. ERROR HANDLING & VALIDATION - MISSING

### Issues Found:
1. **Inconsistent Error Responses** - Beberapa endpoint return 500 dengan generic error
2. **Missing Input Validation** - Banyak endpoint tidak validate input thoroughly
3. **No Rate Limiting** - API tidak ada rate limiting protection
4. **Missing Logging** - Error logging hanya console.log, tidak persistent
5. **No Retry Logic** - Scraper tidak ada retry mechanism untuk failed items
6. **Missing Transaction Handling** - Batch operations tidak atomic

### Examples:
```typescript
// ❌ BAD - Generic error handling
catch (error: any) {
  return reply.status(500).send({ success: false, error: error.message });
}

// ✅ GOOD - Specific error handling needed
catch (error: any) {
  logger.error('Backup failed', { error, userId });
  return reply.status(500).send({ 
    success: false, 
    message: 'Backup gagal, silakan coba lagi',
    errorCode: 'BACKUP_FAILED'
  });
}
```

---

## 5. FRONTEND PAGES - INCOMPLETE

### User-Facing Pages Status

| Page | Status | Issues |
|------|--------|--------|
| Home | 90% | Missing trending calculation |
| Anime/Manga/Donghua | 85% | Missing advanced filters, sorting |
| Watch/Read | 80% | Missing continue watching, bookmarks |
| Profile | 75% | Missing preferences, notification settings |
| Dashboard | 70% | Missing watchlist stats, recommendations |
| Watchlist | 85% | Functional but missing sorting |

---

## 📋 PRIORITAS FITUR - RANKED BY IMPACT & EFFORT

### TIER 1: CRITICAL (Do First - Week 1-2)

**1. AdminBackup & Restore System** 🔴
- **Why**: Data loss risk, no disaster recovery
- **What**: Implement database backup, file compression, restore mechanism
- **Effort**: 3-4 days
- **Files**: 
  - Backend: Create `services/backupService.ts`, add `/api/backup/*` routes
  - Frontend: Connect AdminBackup.tsx to API
  - Infrastructure: Setup cron job untuk scheduled backups

**2. Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)** 🔴
- **Why**: Security risk, permissions not enforced
- **What**: Implement dynamic role creation, permission assignment, middleware enforcement
- **Effort**: 2-3 days
- **Files**:
  - Backend: Create `services/permissionService.ts`, update auth middleware
  - Frontend: Connect AdminPermissions.tsx to API
  - Database: Add permission enforcement in all routes

**3. Analytics Dashboard** 🔴
- **Why**: Admin cannot monitor app performance
- **What**: Implement visitor tracking, device analytics, traffic sources, revenue tracking
- **Effort**: 3-4 days
- **Files**:
  - Backend: Create `services/analyticsService.ts`, add `/api/analytics/*` routes
  - Frontend: Connect AdminAnalytics.tsx tabs to API
  - Infrastructure: Setup event tracking system

---

### TIER 2: HIGH (Week 2-3)

**4. Scraper Management System** 🟡
- **Why**: Scraper automation cannot be monitored/configured
- **What**: Implement scraper source CRUD, queue management, real-time monitoring
- **Effort**: 3-4 days
- **Files**:
  - Backend: Add `/api/scrapers/*` routes, update scraperQueue.ts
  - Frontend: Connect AdminScrapedDashboard.tsx, AdminScrapedConfig.tsx to API

**5. Error Handling & Logging** 🟡
- **Why**: Cannot debug issues, poor error messages
- **What**: Implement structured logging, error tracking, retry logic
- **Effort**: 2-3 days
- **Files**:
  - Backend: Create `services/loggerService.ts`, update all routes
  - Infrastructure: Setup error tracking (Sentry/similar)

**6. Input Validation & Rate Limiting** 🟡
- **Why**: Security vulnerability, API abuse risk
- **What**: Add comprehensive input validation, rate limiting middleware
- **Effort**: 2 days
- **Files**:
  - Backend: Create validation schemas, add rate limiting middleware
  - Update all routes with validation

**7. SEO Management** 🟡
- **Why**: SEO optimization incomplete
- **What**: Implement sitemap generation, robots.txt, redirects, 404 page
- **Effort**: 2-3 days
- **Files**:
  - Backend: Add `/api/seo/sitemap`, `/api/seo/robots`, `/api/seo/redirects` routes
  - Frontend: Complete AdminSEO.tsx tabs

---

### TIER 3: MEDIUM (Week 3-4)

**8. Settings Management** 🟡
- **Why**: Admin cannot configure system properly
- **What**: Complete settings implementation, maintenance mode, cache control
- **Effort**: 1-2 days
- **Files**: Connect AdminSettings.tsx to API, implement missing features

**9. Notification System** 🟡
- **Why**: Users cannot receive important notifications
- **What**: Email notifications, SMS alerts, notification preferences, history
- **Effort**: 2-3 days
- **Files**: Update notificationHandler.ts, add email service

**10. Advanced Scraper Features** 🟡
- **Why**: Scraper reliability low
- **What**: Error recovery, retry logic, proxy rotation, rate limiting
- **Effort**: 2-3 days
- **Files**: Update scraper services, add resilience patterns

---

### TIER 4: NICE-TO-HAVE (Week 4+)

**11. 2FA/MFA Authentication** 🟢
- **Effort**: 2 days
- **Impact**: Security enhancement

**12. Content Recommendations** 🟢
- **Effort**: 3-4 days
- **Impact**: User engagement

**13. Ad Performance Tracking** 🟢
- **Effort**: 2 days
- **Impact**: Revenue optimization

**14. Advanced Analytics** 🟢
- **Effort**: 2-3 days
- **Impact**: Business intelligence

---

## 🎯 IMPLEMENTATION ROADMAP

### Week 1-2: CRITICAL
- [ ] Backup & Restore System
- [ ] RBAC Implementation
- [ ] Analytics Dashboard

### Week 2-3: HIGH PRIORITY
- [ ] Scraper Management
- [ ] Error Handling & Logging
- [ ] Input Validation & Rate Limiting

# RBAC & Analytics Backend Implementation

## Overview

This document describes the complete implementation of Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and Analytics systems for Audira Zenith Tier 1 Critical Features.

## 1. Database Schema Updates

### New Models Added to `packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma`

#### Permission Model
```prisma
model Permission {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  module      String   // e.g., "CONTENT", "USER", "ANALYTICS", "SETTINGS"
  action      String   // e.g., "CREATE", "READ", "UPDATE", "DELETE"
  rolePermissions RolePermission[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([module, action])
  @@index([module])
}
```

#### Role Model
```prisma
model Role {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  permissions RolePermission[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([name])
}
```

#### RolePermission Junction Table
```prisma
model RolePermission {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  roleId       String
  role         Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  permissionId String
  permission   Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([permissionId])
}
```

#### Analytics Models

**PageView Model**
```prisma
model PageView {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  path      String
  referrer  String?
  userAgent String?
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([timestamp])
  @@index([path])
}
```

**Event Model**
```prisma
model Event {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  eventData Json?    // Flexible data storage
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([eventType])
  @@index([timestamp])
}
```

**DeviceInfo Model**
```prisma
model DeviceInfo {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([deviceType])
  @@index([timestamp])
}
```

### User Model Updates
Added relationships to analytics models:
- `pageViews: PageView[]`
- `events: Event[]`
- `deviceInfo: DeviceInfo[]`

Added indexes for performance:
- `@@index([role])`
- `@@index([status])`

## 2. Services Implementation

### PermissionService (`apps/gateway/src/services/permissionService.ts`)

**Features:**
- Role management (create, update, delete, list)
- Permission management (create, list, seed defaults)
- Role-Permission assignment and removal
- Permission checking with caching (5-minute TTL)
- Default permissions seeding

**Key Methods:**
```typescript
createRole(data: RoleData): Promise<Role>
updateRole(roleId: string, data: Partial<RoleData>): Promise<Role>
deleteRole(roleId: string): Promise<{ success: true; message: string }>
assignPermission(roleId: string, permissionId: string): Promise<RolePermission>
removePermission(roleId: string, permissionId: string): Promise<{ success: true; message: string }>
checkPermission(userId: string, module: string, action: string): Promise<boolean>
getRolePermissions(roleId: string): Promise<Role>
getAllRoles(): Promise<Role[]>
getAllPermissions(): Promise<Permission[]>
seedDefaultPermissions(): Promise<{ success: true; message: string }>
```

**Default Permissions Seeded:**
- Content: CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE
- User: CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE
- Analytics: READ, EXPORT
- Settings: READ, UPDATE
- Role: CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE

### AnalyticsService (`apps/gateway/src/services/analyticsService.ts`)

**Features:**
- Page view tracking
- Custom event tracking
- Device info tracking
- User agent parsing (desktop/mobile detection)
- Comprehensive analytics statistics
- Data cleanup for old records (90+ days)

**Key Methods:**
```typescript
trackPageView(data: PageViewData): Promise<PageView>
trackEvent(data: EventData): Promise<Event>
trackDeviceInfo(data: DeviceInfoData): Promise<DeviceInfo>
parseUserAgent(userAgent: string): { deviceType, os, browser }
getOverviewStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<OverviewStats>
getContentStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<ContentStats>
getUserStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<UserStats>
getTrafficStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<TrafficStats>
getRevenueStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<RevenueStats>
getTopPages(limit: number, dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<TopPages>
getDeviceStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<DeviceStats>
getTrafficSources(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<TrafficSources>
getEventStats(dateRange?: DateRange): Promise<EventStats>
cleanupOldData(): Promise<CleanupResult>
```

## 3. Middleware Implementation

### Permission Middleware (`apps/gateway/src/middleware/permissionMiddleware.ts`)

**Middleware Functions:**
- `requirePermission(module, action)` - Check specific permission
- `requireRole(role)` - Check specific role
- `requireAnyRole(roles)` - Check any of multiple roles
- `requireSuperAdminOnly()` - Super admin only access

**Usage Example:**
```typescript
fastify.get('/api/admin/users', 
  { preHandler: [requirePermission('USER', 'READ')] }, 
  handler
);
```

### Analytics Middleware (`apps/gateway/src/middleware/analyticsMiddleware.ts`)

**Features:**
- Automatic page view tracking on all requests
- Non-blocking async tracking
- Device info extraction from user agent
- Referrer tracking
- Optional user ID tracking (if authenticated)

**Usage:**
```typescript
fastify.addHook('onRequest', trackPageViewMiddleware);
```

**Helper Functions:**
- `trackEvent(userId, eventType, eventData)` - Track custom event
- `trackEventAsync(userId, eventType, eventData)` - Non-blocking event tracking

## 7. Dependencies Added

**New Dependencies:**
- `node-cache@^5.1.2` - For permission caching
- `ua-parser-js@^1.0.37` - For user agent parsing
- `@types/ua-parser-js@^0.7.39` - TypeScript types

## 8. Usage Examples

### Creating a Role with Permissions

```bash
# Create role
POST /api/admin/roles
{
  "name": "Content Manager",
  "description": "Manages content"
}

# Get all permissions
GET /api/admin/permissions

# Assign permission to role
POST /api/admin/roles/{roleId}/permissions
{
  "permissionId": "{permissionId}"
}
```

### Checking Analytics

```bash
# Get overview stats for last 30 days
GET /api/admin/analytics/overview

# Get top pages (limit 10)
GET /api/admin/analytics/top-pages?limit=10

# Get stats for specific date range
GET /api/admin/analytics/overview?startDate=2026-04-16&endDate=2026-05-16

# Get device breakdown
GET /api/admin/analytics/devices

# Get traffic sources
GET /api/admin/analytics/traffic-sources
```

### Using Permission Middleware

```typescript
// Require specific permission
fastify.get('/api/admin/content', 
  { preHandler: [requirePermission('CONTENT', 'READ')] },
  async (request, reply) => {
    // Handler code
  }
);

// Require specific role
fastify.post('/api/admin/users',
  { preHandler: [requireRole('SUPER_ADMIN')] },
  async (request, reply) => {
    // Handler code
  }
);

// Require any of multiple roles
fastify.get('/api/admin/dashboard',
  { preHandler: [requireAnyRole(['SUPER_ADMIN', 'ADMIN'])] },
  async (request, reply) => {
    // Handler code
  }
);
```

### Tracking Events

```typescript
import { trackEventAsync } from './middleware/analyticsMiddleware';

// In a route handler
fastify.post('/api/content/:id/watch', async (request, reply) => {
  const { id: userId } = request.user as { id: string };
  const { id: contentId } = request.params as { id: string };
  
  // Track watch event asynchronously
  trackEventAsync(userId, 'WATCH', { contentId, timestamp: new Date() });
  
  // Continue with handler logic
  return { success: true };
});
```

## 9. Performance Considerations

### Caching
- Permission checks are cached for 5 minutes using node-cache
- Cache is automatically cleared when roles/permissions are modified

### Indexes
- All analytics tables have indexes on `userId`, `timestamp`, and relevant fields
- Permission and Role tables have indexes on frequently queried fields

### Data Cleanup
- Old analytics data (90+ days) can be cleaned up via `/api/admin/analytics/cleanup`
- Recommended to run this periodically (e.g., weekly via cron job)

## 10. Security Features

- JWT authentication required for all admin endpoints
- Role-based access control enforced at middleware level
- Super admin role has all permissions by default
- Permission checking is cached to reduce database queries
- User agent parsing is safe and handles invalid input gracefully

## 13. Troubleshooting

### Database Connection Issues
- Ensure DATABASE_URL is set correctly in .env
- Verify database server is running
- Check database credentials

### Permission Checks Failing
- Verify user role is set correctly
- Check if permission exists in database
- Clear permission cache if needed

### Analytics Not Tracking
- Verify analytics middleware is registered
- Check if user agent parsing is working
- Ensure database has PageView, Event, DeviceInfo tables

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// --- USER & ACCESS CONTROL ---

enum UserRole {
  SUPER_ADMIN
  ADMIN
  EDITOR
  MODERATOR
  USER
}

enum UserStatus {
  AKTIF
  NON_AKTIF
  DIBLOKIR
}

model User {
  id            String        @id @default(cuid())
  email         String        @unique
  username      String        @unique
  name          String?
  password      String
  avatar        String?
  role          UserRole      @default(USER)
  status        UserStatus    @default(AKTIF)
  lastLogin     DateTime?
  comments      Comment[]
  activityLogs  ActivityLog[]
  watchlist     Watchlist[]
  ratings       UserRating[]
  watchHistory  WatchHistory[]
  pageViews     PageView[]
  events        Event[]
  deviceInfo    DeviceInfo[]
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime      @updatedAt

  @@index([role])
  @@index([status])
}

// --- CONTENT MANAGEMENT ---

enum ContentStatus {
  ONGOING
  COMPLETED
  HIATUS
  DROPPED
}

enum ContentType {
  ANIME
  MANGA
  DONGHUA
}

model Content {
  id          String        @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  slug        String        @unique
  description String?
  imageUrl    String?
  type        ContentType   @default(ANIME)
  status      ContentStatus @default(ONGOING)
  rating      Float         @default(0)
  author      String?
  artist      String?
  studio      String?
  releasedAt  String?       // Year or full date string
  genres      Genre[]       @relation("ContentToGenre")
  tags        Tag[]         @relation("ContentToTag")
  episodes    Episode[]
  comments    Comment[]
  createdAt   DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime      @updatedAt
}

model Episode {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  slug        String   @unique
  number      Float
  contentId   String
  content     Content  @relation(fields: [contentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  videoUrl    String?  // For Anime/Donghua
  images      String[] // For Manga (array of image URLs)
  type        String   @default("FREE") // FREE or PREMIUM
  views       Int      @default(0)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Genre {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  name        String    @unique
  slug        String    @unique
  description String?
  status      String    @default("AKTIF")
  contents    Content[] @relation("ContentToGenre")
}

model Tag {
  id       String    @id @default(cuid())
  name     String    @unique
  slug     String    @unique
  contents Content[] @relation("ContentToTag")
}

// --- NEWS & PAGES ---

model News {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  slug        String   @unique
  content     String   @db.Text
  imageUrl    String?
  category    String   @default("UMUM")
  isFeatured  Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Page {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  title     String
  slug      String   @unique
  content   String   @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Banner {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  subtitle    String?
  description String?
  imageUrl    String
  link        String?
  order       Int      @default(0)
  isActive    Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
}

// --- INTERACTION ---

model Comment {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  text      String   @db.Text
  status    String   @default("PENDING") // PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  content   Content  @relation(fields: [contentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

// --- SYSTEM & MARKETING ---

model Ad {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  title     String
  position  String   // e.g., HOMEPAGE_TOP, SIDEBAR
  type      String   @default("IMAGE")
  imageUrl  String?
  linkUrl   String?
  status    String   @default("ACTIVE")
  startDate DateTime?
  endDate   DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

model ActivityLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  module    String   // e.g., MANGA, USER, SETTINGS
  action    String   // e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN
  detail    String   @db.Text
  ipAddress String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

model Setting {
  id    String @id @default(cuid())
  key   String @unique
  value String @db.Text
}

model SeoConfig {
  id              String  @id @default(cuid())
  title           String?
  description     String?
  keywords        String?
  ogTitle         String?
  ogDescription   String?
  ogImage         String?
  robotsMeta      String? @default("index, follow")
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt
}

// --- AUTOMATION & SCRAPING ---

model ScraperSource {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  baseUrl     String
  type        String   // e.g., "MangaDex", "ComicK"
  language    String   @default("EN")
  interval    Int      @default(60) // in minutes
  status      String   @default("Aktif") // Aktif, Non-Aktif, Error
  lastScraped DateTime?
  config      Json?    // Stores data types (Manga, Chapter, etc.) and other settings
  logs        ScraperLog[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

model ScraperLog {
  id              String        @id @default(cuid())
  sourceId        String
  source          ScraperSource @relation(fields: [sourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  status          String        // "BERJALAN", "SELESAI", "ERROR", "MENUNGGU"
  itemsFound      Int           @default(0)
  itemsAdded      Int           @default(0)
  itemsFailed     Int           @default(0)
  speedItemPerMin Float         @default(0)
  responseTimeMs  Int           @default(0)
  duration        String?       // e.g., "02:15"
  error           String?       @db.Text
  startedAt       DateTime      @default(now())
  endedAt         DateTime?
}


// --- USER ENGAGEMENT ---

model Watchlist {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  status    String   @default("WATCHING") // WATCHING, COMPLETED, PLAN_TO_WATCH, DROPPED, ON_HOLD
  progress  Int      @default(0) // episode/chapter number
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([userId, contentId])
}

model UserRating {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  score     Float    // 1-10
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([userId, contentId])
}

model WatchHistory {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  contentId String
  episodeId String?
  progress  Float    @default(0) // percentage or page number
  watchedAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId, contentId])
}

// --- RBAC SYSTEM ---

model Permission {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  module      String   // e.g., "CONTENT", "USER", "ANALYTICS", "SETTINGS"
  action      String   // e.g., "CREATE", "READ", "UPDATE", "DELETE"
  rolePermissions RolePermission[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([module, action])
  @@index([module])
}

model Role {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  name        String   @unique
  description String?
  permissions RolePermission[]
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([name])
}

model RolePermission {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  roleId       String
  role         Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  permissionId String
  permission   Permission @relation(fields: [permissionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([roleId, permissionId])
  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([permissionId])
}

// --- ANALYTICS SYSTEM ---

model PageView {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  path      String
  referrer  String?
  userAgent String?
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([timestamp])
  @@index([path])
}

model Event {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  eventType String   // e.g., "CLICK", "SEARCH", "WATCH", "RATE"
  eventData Json?    // Flexible data storage
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([eventType])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

model DeviceInfo {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String?
  user      User?    @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  deviceType String  // e.g., "MOBILE", "TABLET", "DESKTOP"
  os        String?  // e.g., "Windows", "iOS", "Android"
  browser   String?  // e.g., "Chrome", "Safari", "Firefox"
  timestamp DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([deviceType])
  @@index([timestamp])
}

GET    /api/admin/roles/:id                          - Get role with permissions
PUT    /api/admin/roles/:id                          - Update role
DELETE /api/admin/roles/:id                          - Delete role
POST   /api/admin/roles/:id/permissions              - Assign permission
